'''Yani''' was a [[Nightsisters/Legends|Nightsister]] of [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]]. After discovering fellow clanswoman [[Ros Lai]] was mysteriously [[Mind trick/Legends#Force illusion|healed]] of her deformities, she became terrified of Ros Lai's vengeance after she quickly and brutally murdered another sister, [[Leela]].
